steps.title: Test values instead of expanding powers
steps.content: Because the question asks for an equivalent expression and $x>0$, use a quick table check. Test $x=1$ and $x=2$ in the original expression.

steps.title: Compare each choice list
steps.content: Evaluate each answer choice on the same $x$-list. Only choice D gives the same list as the original for both values.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice D is $7x^2(x^4-2)$, which matches $7x^6-14x^2$. Therefore choice D is correct.
